data.content: Implementation review approved. Core requirement satisfied: beat detail lightbox displays both natural beat ID and aliases inline, both click-to-copy, with '| alias (alias)' format. getDisplayedBeatAliases strips repo prefix for concise display. All quality gates pass (1995 tests, lint clean, typecheck clean). Backend alias→ID map and parentFromHierarchicalAlias correctly resolve alias-based hierarchy. Note: diff includes out-of-scope changes (promoteTerminalParents, knots Scene routing, agent pool diagnostics, settings layout) that pass all tests but should ideally be in separate beats.
